name: Infinity Extend Contracture
shortDescription: Used to create a sequence of splints that gradually straightens the PIP joint.

inputParameters.InputDescription: 1. P1 circumference (mm) at the midpoint of the proximal phalanx.
3. P2 circumference (mm) at the midpoint of the middle phalanx.
4. Interphalangeal length (mm) - Midpoint of the proximal phalanx to midpoint of the middle phalanx.
5a. Contracture flexion sequence start angle (degrees) from a straight position.
5b. Contracture flexion sequence end angle (degrees) from a straight position.
Contracture flexion sequence count. This will be the number of splints printed.
